input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.9.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.9.4
            TITLE: teams costing bought parts as made parts will be penalized.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.9.4: Teams costing Bought parts as Made parts will be penalized.
S.3.9.4 Teams costing Bought parts as Made parts will be penalized.

final_answer: Teams costing Bought parts as Made parts will be penalized.
